action_set_definitions.name: get_session_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves global session metadata, including sample rate, bit depth, and current Dolby Atmos renderer status.

action_set_definitions.name: get_master_settings
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the current configuration of the master output bus, including the current peak level, limiter ceiling, master gain, and binaural render modes.

action_set_definitions.name: update_master_gain
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the master bus gain level to manage overall signal level and headroom.

action_set_definitions.name: get_track_layout
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all tracks in the session with their IDs, names, current routing, volume levels, mute/solo status, and binaural metadata assignments.

action_set_definitions.name: update_track_status
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the mute or solo status of a specific track to ensure correct balance.

track_id.description: The unique identifier of the audio track.

mute.description: Set to true to mute the track, false to unmute.

solo.description: Set to true to solo the track, false to unsolo.

action_set_definitions.name: configure_master_limiter
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the True Peak ceiling for the Dolby Atmos master bus to ensure technical compliance.

true_peak_ceiling.description: The maximum allowed true peak level in dBTP (e.g., -1.0).

action_set_definitions.name: update_track_binaural_mode
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the binaural distance metadata (Near, Mid, Far, or Off) for a specific track.

track_id.description: The unique identifier of the audio track.

action_set_definitions.name: fix_routing_issue
action_set_definitions.description: Re-routes a track to the correct Atmos Bed or Object path.

new_target.description: The destination bus or object index.

action_set_definitions.name: trigger_adm_export
action_set_definitions.description: Generates the final ADM BWF master file for delivery.

filename.description: The name of the exported file.

state_description.session_metadata: Global settings for the mixing session.
state_description.tracks: List of individual audio tracks in the session.
